languages.text: "Та еще диковинка вышла! Отправь его на верхние палубы, пусть офицеры дивятся и потешаются".

traits.locale_text: "Та еще диковинка вышла! Отправь его на верхние палубы, пусть офицеры дивятся и потешаются".

languages.text: "My, quite the oddity he has become! Send him to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of him."
languages.original_text: "Та еще диковинка вышла! Отправь его на верхние палубы, пусть офицеры дивятся и потешаются".

traits.locale_text: "My, quite the oddity he has become! Send him to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of him."
"My, quite the oddity he has become! Send him to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of him."
"My, you are an oddity! I'll send you to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of you."
"My, quite the oddity he has become! Send him to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of him."
"My, quite the oddity he has become! Send him to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of him."

languages.text: 「お前は変わった奴だな！上甲板に連れて行って、将校たちに驚かせ、笑わせてもらおう」
languages.original_text: "My, you are an oddity! I'll send you to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of you."

traits.locale_text: 「お前は変わった奴だな！上甲板に連れて行って、将校たちに驚かせ、笑わせてもらおう。」

languages.text: “瞧瞧他现在的古怪模样！送他去上层甲板，让军官们也开开眼，拿他逗逗乐。”
languages.original_text: "My, quite the oddity he has become! Send him to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of him."

traits.locale_text: “瞧瞧他现在的古怪模样！送他去上层甲板，让军官们也开开眼，拿他逗逗乐。”

languages.text: « C'est devenu une vraie bête de foire, ma parole ! Qu'on l'envoie sur les ponts supérieurs, où il deviendra le bouffon attitré des officiers. »
languages.original_text: "My, quite the oddity he has become! Send him to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of him."

traits.locale_text: « C'est devenu une vraie bête de foire, ma parole ! Qu'on l'envoie sur les ponts supérieurs, où il deviendra le bouffon attitré des officiers. »

languages.text: «¡Menudo resultado más singular! Que vaya a las cubiertas superiores para que los oficiales disfruten observándolo y riéndose de él».
languages.original_text: "My, quite the oddity he has become! Send him to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of him."

traits.locale_text: «¡Menudo resultado más singular! Que vaya a las cubiertas superiores para que los oficiales disfruten observándolo y riéndose de él».

languages.text: "Aman, Ne tuhaf bir şey oldu öyle! Onu üst güvertelere gönderin, subaylar hayretler için kalıp onunla eğlensin."
languages.original_text: "My, quite the oddity he has become! Send him to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of him."

traits.locale_text: "Aman, Ne tuhaf bir şey oldu öyle! Onu üst güvertelere gönderin, subaylar hayretler için kalıp onunla eğlensin."

languages.text: "Meine Güte, was ist nur aus ihm geworden. Schickt ihn auf die oberen Decks, damit sich die Offiziere über ihn lustig machen können."
languages.original_text: "My, quite the oddity he has become! Send him to the upper decks, and let the officers marvel and make sport of him."

traits.locale_text: "Meine Güte, was ist nur aus ihm geworden. Schickt ihn auf die oberen Decks, damit sich die Offiziere über ihn lustig machen können."
